theme.label: Thème
hero.line3: you can move into — not job sites you hope will finish.
hero.sub: We renovate apartments, townhouses and commercial spaces across Belgium — Brussels, Antwerp, Ghent, Bruges, Leuven, Liège, Namur, Charleroi, Mechelen, Hasselt, Mons and surrounding areas — with obsessive attention to detail, on-time delivery and full cost transparency. You focus on the result — we handle everything from demolition to the last handle.

services.title: Everything you need, under one contract
services.intro: From the first survey to keys in hand — we coordinate the whole job so you can move in without stress.
services.s1.title: Full turnkey renovations
services.s1.desc: Apartments and houses fully renovated: demolition, systems upgrade, finishes, bespoke furniture, handover with keys on the table.
services.s2.title: Bathrooms & kitchens
services.s2.desc: The most demanding rooms in the home, executed flawlessly — from waterproofing to quartz worktops.
services.s3.title: Design & 3D planning
services.s3.desc: See how it will look before a wall comes down. 3D plans, material choices, budget optimisation.
services.s4.title: Commercial renovations
services.s4.desc: Medical practices, offices, shops, restaurants — fast execution respecting your opening hours.
work.title: Projects that speak for us
work.intro: Every project is a promise kept — not just a portfolio. Tap for details, before/after photos and what we did differently.
work.p1: 95 sqm in Ixelles, Brussels — renovated in 7 weeks: open plan, island kitchen, walk-in wardrobe.
work.p2: 180 sqm in Uccle, Brussels — premium industrial design: exposed concrete, black metal, natural wood.
work.p3: Interwar house in Bruges, 140 sqm — reclaimed parquet, restored plasterwork, hidden services.
work.p4: Premium dental clinic in Brussels, 70 sqm — sanitary finishes, acoustic insulation, designed lighting.
diff.title: We're not just another crew of tradespeople. We're the partner you can trust.
diff.intro: In a market full of promises and dishonest estimates, we deliver magazine-worthy renovations, on the date we promised, at the price we agreed. Full stop.
diff.c1.title: Strategy before the first hammer
diff.c1.desc: We understand how you'll live in the space — then we plan execution. Not the other way around.
diff.c2.title: Premium materials, no hidden mark-up
diff.c2.desc: We work directly with suppliers. You pay their price, not our margin.
diff.c3.title: End-to-end delivery
diff.c3.desc: Demolition, electrical and plumbing, plasterboard, painting, flooring, furniture, final cleaning — one contract.
diff.c4.title: Full transparency
diff.c4.desc: You always know where we are, what's next and what it costs — no invoice surprises.
diff.c5.title: Obsession with detail
diff.c5.desc: Perfect corners, straight silicone, switches aligned to the millimetre. Quality shows under raking light.
diff.c6.title: You're the next project
diff.c6.desc: Every home we renovate becomes the reference for the next client. That could be you.
feat.f1.title: Own team
feat.f1.desc: No random subcontractors. The same hands from the first hammer to the last brush stroke.
feat.f2.title: Dedicated site manager
feat.f2.desc: One person owns your project. One phone number.
feat.f3.title: Daily photo report
feat.f3.desc: See exactly what was done today — without visiting the site.
cta.sub: Send us a plan, a sketch or a photo of your space. We reply within 24h with a ballpark estimate — no obligation, no pressure.
footer.tagline: Your partner for premium interior renovations across Belgium — Brussels, Antwerp, Ghent, Bruges, Leuven, Liège, Namur, Charleroi and surrounding areas.
form.thanks: Thank you — we'll be in touch soon
project.diffTitle: What sets us apart on this project
project.ctaTitle: Want the same clarity for your next renovation?
project.ctaSub: Let's plan your space together — from the first metre to handover.
p.aurora.lead: A 95 sqm apartment transformed in 7 weeks — bright open plan, island kitchen and walk-in dressing, with no compromise on finishes.
p.aurora.challenge: The owners wanted a modern flow in a fragmented layout, with outdated installations and a tight deadline before moving in.
p.aurora.solution: We replanned the layout, renewed installations, installed plasterboard and premium finishes, with a clean site and daily reporting.
p.aurora.d1: One contract for demolition, systems, finishes and furniture installation.
p.aurora.d2: Corners, joints and silicone straight — we only accept the standard we promised.
p.aurora.d3: Week-by-week plan, penalties if we overrun — and we don't.
p.nova.lead: A 180 sqm penthouse with premium industrial aesthetics — exposed concrete, matte black metal and natural wood, delivered with interior-architecture detail.
p.nova.challenge: The generous space needed visual coherence between zones without losing daylight or acoustic comfort.
p.nova.solution: We defined a limited material palette, scenic lighting and bespoke joinery, with day-to-day site supervision.
p.nova.r2: types of finish coordinated (wood, metal, concrete)
p.nova.d1: Warm textures and calibrated light so the loft feels lived-in, not just photogenic.
p.nova.d2: Aligned profiles and joints — quality shows in evening light.
p.nova.d3: Protection, quiet hours and daily cleaning — neighbours stay neighbours.
p.nova.ctaTitle: Have a penthouse or duplex to harmonise?
p.nova.ctaSub: We'll propose a 3D plan, budget by category and a realistic schedule.
p.orbit.lead: Full restoration of a 140 sqm interwar house — reclaimed parquet, hand-restored plasterwork, new services concealed in technical voids.
p.orbit.challenge: Old building: uneven walls, fragile ceiling ornament and a brief to keep historic character.
p.orbit.solution: We worked with restoration craftspeople for decor, and our teams for systems and insulation to current standards.
p.orbit.d1: Photos at every stage and samples approved before application on original surfaces.
p.orbit.d2: Heating, electrics and IT hidden — today's comfort, classic silhouette.
p.orbit.d3: Dedicated site manager for specialist craftspeople and the PRV crew.
p.orbit.ctaTitle: Have an old house to save?
p.orbit.ctaSub: We assess structure, propose legal and aesthetic steps, and deliver without surprises.
p.lumen.lead: A premium 70 sqm dental clinic — sanitary finishes, acoustic insulation between surgeries and designed lighting for patient comfort.
p.lumen.challenge: The practice schedule required short site phases and delivery across consecutive weekends.
p.lumen.solution: We phased routes, used medically certified materials and installed doors and glazing with acoustic attenuation.
p.lumen.d1: Planning with reception — we work when the space is closed, without losing appointments.
p.lumen.d2: Epoxy joints, closed skirting, dust-free corners — medical standard.
p.lumen.d3: Front desk, waiting zone and work lights speak the same visual language.
p.lumen.ctaTitle: Renovating a medical or commercial space?
p.lumen.ctaSub: We deliver a phased quote with milestones tied to visible progress.
footer.newsletter.title: NEWSLETTER
footer.newsletter.desc: Design ideas, new projects and budget guides — once a month, offers, no spam.
footer.newsletter.privacy: By subscribing you agree to hear from PRV Projects. Unsubscribe anytime.
footer.newsletter.success: Thanks! You're subscribed to our newsletter.
footer.newsletter.error: Please enter a valid email address.
blog.title: Learn before you start renovating
blog.intro: Articles on budget, materials and costly mistakes — for people who want to know what they're paying for.
blog.teaserIntro: Articles on budget, materials and costly mistakes — for people who want to know what they're paying for.
blog.ctaTitle: Want the same standards on your project?
blog.ctaSub: Send us dimensions or a plan — we'll come back with next steps.
blog.post1.title: What a renovation really costs in 2026 — guide per square metre
blog.post1.excerpt: Realistic price ranges per sqm, what moves the needle and how to avoid an empty estimate.
blog.post1.p1: In 2026, turnkey renovation pricing in Belgium depends on the state of installations, ceiling height and finishes — not sqm alone.
blog.post1.p2: We show how we split the budget (demolition, systems, finishes, furniture) so you see where every euro goes.
blog.post1.p3: Want an estimate for your case? Send the plan — we reply with a range and clarification steps.
blog.post2.title: 5 mistakes that double your renovation budget (and how to avoid them)
blog.post2.excerpt: Scope creep on site, materials without samples and missing contract detail — in short.
blog.post2.p1: 1) Starting without an approved 3D plan. 2) Picking the cheapest quote without specs. 3) Skipping waterproofing. 4) Changing tiles after install. 5) No contingency budget.
blog.post2.p2: At PRV every phase is signed off and photographed — you know what's next and what it costs before we start the shift.
blog.post2.p3: Book a site visit — we'll tell you honestly whether to continue with the current idea or revise the budget.
blog.post3.title: Why liquid glass and exposed concrete dominate premium interior design
blog.post3.excerpt: Contrast between matte surfaces and fine reflections — without kitsch.
blog.post3.p1: Liquid glass in interiors means laminated glass doors, panels and brushed finishes — light plays without clutter.
blog.post3.p2: Exposed concrete, done right, adds depth; we balance it with warm wood and textiles so the space stays livable.
blog.post3.p3: Want a coherent material palette? We review your plan and suggest combinations proven on site.
about.hero.line3: Today we're the company that won't make you regret it.
about.hero.sub: PRV Projects was born in Brussels in 2017 from a simple question: why is it so hard to find a renovation firm that keeps its word, whether you're Belgian or Romanian? We built the answer ourselves. Nine years and 200+ projects later, we're the trusted partner for people who want a home, not a promise — across Belgium (Brussels, Antwerp, Ghent, Bruges, Leuven, Liège, Namur and more).
about.story.title: From a flat in Saint-Gilles to 200+ renovated homes
about.story.p1: In 2017 we completed our first project — a 38 sqm flat in Saint-Gilles for a Romanian family in Brussels. Two teams had walked out on them. The job should have taken 4 weeks. The previous crews took six months without finishing and without a detailed invoice.
about.story.p2: We delivered in 5 weeks. Clean, on time, every euro justified, all paperwork in order for the building syndic. The client referred us to three neighbours. The neighbours to five more. That's how PRV Projects started — not with a business plan, but with a reputation.
about.story.p3: Today we're a team of 14: site managers, installers, electricians, plasterers, painters, fitters — all on employment contracts, declared legally, not "found on Facebook". We work in Brussels, Flemish Brabant and Walloon Brabant, from 30 sqm studios to 300 sqm townhouses and commercial spaces.
about.story.p4: We know Belgian buildings — 100-year-old brick walls, systems that must meet current codes, planning permission when needed, communication with the syndic. You won't hit administrative surprises halfway through the job.
about.story.p5: We're not the cheapest firm in Brussels. We don't want to be. We're the firm you choose after you've been burned once — or the one you pick first if you never want to get burned at all.
about.values.title: Five rules we never break
about.values.intro: These aren't website slogans. They're why clients recommend us across the Romanian community in Belgium.
about.values.c1.title: We keep our word
about.values.c1.desc: The promised deadline is the delivered deadline. The estimated price is the invoiced price. If we mess up, we pay.
about.values.c2.title: Your home, not our messy site
about.values.c2.desc: We protect furniture, use industrial vacuums, clean daily. We respect building rules and quiet hours — neighbours stay neighbours.
about.values.c3.title: A team, not day labourers
about.values.c3.desc: Everyone is a PRV employee, declared under Belgian law. The same hands from the first chisel to the last brush stroke, on every project.
about.values.c4.title: Radical transparency
about.values.c4.desc: You see material invoices. You see the daily photo report. All paperwork — compliant invoice, correct VAT, written warranty — no exceptions.
about.values.c5.title: Quality shows in the light
about.values.c5.desc: We check every corner with raking light before handover. If we wouldn't accept it, we don't hand it over.
about.team.title: A team, not a gig platform
about.team.intro: You know the people renovating your home. By name, face and trade.
about.team.t1.name: Adrian P.
about.team.t1.bio: 9 years in construction, the last 9 in Belgium. Speaks with every client before the quote and after handover.
about.team.t2.name: Mihai R.
about.team.t2.bio: 12 years on site. Specialises in old Brussels buildings and interior facade restoration.
about.team.t3.name: Andreea M.
about.team.t3.bio: Degree in interior architecture. Builds the 3D plans that show your home before it exists.
about.team.t4.name: Bianca T.
about.team.t4.bio: Speaks Romanian, French and English. The person you call with a question — replies within 2 hours during office hours.
about.process.title: From the first call to keys in hand
about.process.intro: Four clear steps — no surprises, no hidden phases.
about.process.p1.title: Site visit & measurements
about.process.p1.desc: We come to you anywhere in Belgium (Brussels, Antwerp, Ghent, Bruges, Leuven, Liège, Namur etc.), measure, listen to what you want and how you want to live in the space. 60–90 minutes. Free, no obligation.
about.process.p2.title: Detailed quote in 5 days
about.process.p2.desc: You get a line-item quote — demolition, systems, finishes, furniture, labour — with quantities, unit prices, VAT per Belgian law (6% or 21% as applicable) and total duration. No vague "misc".
about.process.p3.title: Supervised execution
about.process.p3.desc: We start only after signed contract and approved 3D plans. Dedicated site manager, daily photo report on WhatsApp, milestone payments tied to visible progress. We handle syndic communication if needed.
about.process.p4.title: Handover & 10-year warranty
about.process.p4.desc: Final cleaning included. Full walkthrough, snagging list, compliant invoice and decennial warranty per Belgian law for structures, plus 2 years on finishes.
about.final.title: Are we a fit?
about.final.sub: If you're looking for the cheapest quote in Belgium, we're not it. If you want an impeccably renovated home, on time, with paperwork in order — we're exactly who you need.
cookie.title: Privacy & cookies
cookie.desc: Essential cookies for the site and, with your consent, analytics. You choose.
cookie.policyText: PRV Projects processes data under GDPR. Contact: hello@prvprojects.be
work.p5: 78 sqm in Antwerp — warm palette, built-in wardrobe and compact premium kitchen.
work.p6: 120 sqm by Ghent canals — oak flooring, mineral plasters and light across three levels.
work.p7: 95 sqm restaurant in Brussels — open kitchen, hard-wearing finishes and scenic lighting.
work.p8: Master + guest bath in Liège — microcement, walk-in shower and floating vanity.
work.p9: 38 sqm studio in Bruges — wall bed, hidden kitchen and vertical storage.
work.p10: 160 sqm office in Antwerp — focus zones, treated meeting rooms and premium reception.
p.velvet.lead: 78 sqm apartment in Antwerp renovated in 6 weeks — warm living room, walk-in wardrobe and compact premium kitchen.
p.velvet.challenge: The flat was chopped into small rooms, with outdated services and poor light toward the courtyard.
p.velvet.solution: We opened the living area, relocated the kitchen to the structural wall and added full-height storage in phased works.
p.velvet.d1: Every centimetre counts — furniture and finishes chosen for real comfort, not just photos.
p.velvet.d2: Warm wood, textiles and layered lighting — one language throughout.
p.velvet.d3: Protection, quiet hours and daily clean-up — no neighbour conflicts.
p.velvet.ctaTitle: Got an apartment to optimise in Belgium?
p.velvet.ctaSub: Plan, itemised quote and realistic schedule within 24h.
p.canal.lead: 120 sqm townhouse by Ghent canals — oak floors, mineral plasters and daylight on three levels.
p.canal.challenge: Old walls, varying ceiling heights and a brief to keep the Flemish house character.
p.canal.solution: We reinforced screeds, rerouted services in technical zones and restored joinery to detail.
p.canal.d1: Oak, lime plaster and matte metal — authentic yet maintainable.
p.canal.d2: Stairs and light wells reworked to bring daylight into the deep plan.
p.canal.d3: Plasterers and floor layers experienced in Flanders heritage buildings.
p.canal.ctaTitle: Renovating an old house in Ghent or Bruges?
p.canal.ctaSub: We assess structure, propose steps and deliver without quote surprises.
p.atlas.lead: 95 sqm restaurant in Brussels — open kitchen, traffic-resistant finishes and evening scenic lighting.
p.atlas.challenge: Opening the kitchen to the dining room required ventilation, acoustics and surfaces that survive daily cleaning.
p.atlas.solution: Technical panels, epoxy joints and a phased schedule with night shifts.
p.atlas.d1: Coordinated with the kitchen — we work when the venue is closed.
p.atlas.d2: Easy-care surfaces without sacrificing a premium look.
p.atlas.d3: Bar, dining room and entrance share one language — guests feel the concept at the door.
p.atlas.ctaTitle: Opening or refurbishing a venue in Brussels?
p.atlas.ctaSub: Phased quote with milestones tied to opening day.
p.serene.lead: Full renovation of master (14 sqm) and guest (8 sqm) bathrooms in Liège — microcement, walk-in shower and bespoke floating vanity.
p.serene.challenge: Failed waterproofing, insufficient shower fall and bulky old furniture.
p.serene.solution: We rebuilt the waterproof layer, corrected drainage, applied microcement and fitted hidden-storage wall units.
p.serene.d1: Moisture tests and joint detail — no "fix again in six months".
p.serene.d2: Mirrors, indirect light and a light palette — bigger feel without moving walls.
p.serene.d3: Checklist sign-off — ready to use the same day.
p.serene.ctaTitle: Refitting a bathroom in Liège or Brussels?
p.serene.ctaSub: Technical visit, line-item quote and clear timeline.
p.studio.lead: 38 sqm studio in Bruges — wall bed, hidden kitchen and vertical storage without a "hotel room" feel.
p.studio.challenge: One volume for sleep, work and cook, with a low ceiling and a narrow street window.
p.studio.solution: We defined zones by colour and material, multi-functional furniture and lighting on three circuits.
p.studio.d1: Every piece does double duty — sleep, storage or work.
p.studio.d2: Acoustic layer on the party wall and a solid door — real comfort, not just looks.
p.studio.d3: Fixed quote by category — ideal for a first flat.
p.studio.ctaSub: 3D plan + material list before the first hammer.
p.harbor.lead: 160 sqm office in Antwerp — focus zones, acoustically treated meeting rooms and a high-impact reception.
p.harbor.challenge: Noisy open plan, not enough booths and brand image misaligned with a premium positioning.
p.harbor.solution: We segmented acoustics with glazing and panels, renewed technical flooring and DALI lighting by zone.
p.harbor.r2: sqm of office delivered in phases
p.harbor.d1: Tested meeting and focus rooms — private conversations stay private.
p.harbor.d2: Raised floor and planned voids — no cables on show.
p.harbor.d3: Teams moved in by zone — business didn't stand still.
p.harbor.ctaTitle: Fitting out an office in Antwerp or Brussels?
p.harbor.ctaSub: Phased plan with reception and focus areas delivered first.

faq.title: Questions fréquentes
faq.sub: Coûts, délais, garanties et notre façon de travailler en Belgique.
faq.a1: Selon surface, état et matériaux. En Belgique, souvent à partir de 800–1 400 €/m² en qualité premium. Devis détaillé avant signature.
faq.q2: Quelle est la durée d'un projet ?
faq.a2: Appartement 60–90 m² : environ 8–14 semaines. Maisons plus grandes : 4–6 mois. Délai fixé au contrat.
faq.a3: Non. Toute la Belgique — Bruxelles, Anvers, Gand, Bruges, Louvain, Liège, Namur, Charleroi, Malines, Hasselt, Mons et environs.
faq.a4: Oui. Visite et estimation gratuites, sans engagement.
faq.a5: Garantie décennale (structure) + 2 ans sur finitions, conformément au droit belge.
faq.a6: Oui, après validation des plans. Toute modification est chiffrée et approuvée avant travaux.
faq.a7: Un chef de chantier dédié. Rapport quotidien avec photos.
faq.a8: Envoyez plans ou photos via le formulaire ou hello@prvprojects.be. Réponse sous 24 h.
privacy.title: Politique de confidentialité
privacy.intro: PRV Projects respecte le RGPD et la loi belge sur la protection des données.
privacy.s1.title: 1. Responsable du traitement
privacy.s1.body: PRV Projects — rénovations en Belgique. Contact : hello@prvprojects.be.
privacy.s2.title: 2. Données collectées
privacy.s2.body: Formulaires, newsletter, cookies essentiels ou analytics (avec consentement).
privacy.s3.title: 3. Finalités
privacy.s3.body: Devis, contrat, communication marketing (avec accord), amélioration du site.
privacy.s4.title: 4. Cookies
privacy.s4.body: Essentiels pour le site. Analytics si vous cliquez « Tout accepter ».
privacy.s5.title: 5. Destinataires
privacy.s5.body: Hébergement, formulaires, e-mail. Pas de vente de données.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Conservation
privacy.s6.body: Devis : 24 mois max. Contrat : durée légale. Newsletter : jusqu'à désinscription.
privacy.s7.title: 7. Vos droits
privacy.s7.body: Accès, rectification, effacement, opposition, plainte à l'APD. hello@prvprojects.be — 30 jours.
privacy.s8.title: 8. Modifications
privacy.s8.body: Politique mise à jour sur cette page.
